creator: vvd@FreeBSD.org
text:
Use MariaDB since FreeBSD 10 on all installations instead of MySQL: with exim+dovecot, Roundcube, Zoneminder, MediaWiki, WordPress, MODX without issues.
Also most Linux distros switched default MySQL to MariaDB many years ago.

I can prepare patch for Mk/bsd.default-versions.mk, Uses/mysql.mk and can to try for UPDATING.
